description:

title: Dean of Vincennes University Jasper campus to step down
description:
Vincennes University announced Monday that Adam Watkins will step down as assistant vice president and dean of the university's campus in Jasper at the end of this month.

title: Historic New Harmony named Blue Star Museum
description:
Historic New Harmony, an attraction of 23 historic properties managed by the University of Southern Indiana, is participating in a national program this summer to offer free admission to U.S. military personnel.

title: US manufacturing activity expands by most in four years
description:
The Institute for Supply Management’s manufacturing gauge rose 1.3 points to 54, according to data released Monday. Readings above 50 indicate growth.
